title: Fold Launches 'Bitcoin Bonus' Program for Employers Following Steak 'n Shake Debut
summary: Publicly traded Bitcoin services firm Fold is rolling out a program to let companies grant employees bonuses in crypto.

title: Fold (FLD) Launches Bitcoin Bonus Program For Employers Through Fold Business Platform - Bitcoin Magazine

title: Aave rallies DeFi partners to contain fallout from $292 million KelpDAO hack
summary: Industry players are coordinating a recovery effort as the year's biggest crypto rattled Aave, with Lido and EtherFi being firsts to offer aid.
